channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nick Koskei Laid to Rest in Bomet Amid Heartfelt Tributes
item.description: On Saturday, March 7, mourners gathered at Nick Koskei's home in Kipkebe, Silibwet Township Ward, Bomet County, to bid farewell to the young journalist who tragically died in a helicopter crash on Feb...

item.title: B.C. adopts permanent daylight saving time to improve health and productivity
item.description: On March 2, 2026, British Columbia enacted a new policy to adopt permanent daylight saving time, eliminating the semi-annual clock changes that have been in place for over a century. The policy aims t...

item.title: Lightning defeat Maple Leafs 5-2 with Kucherov reaching 100 points
item.description: In a dominant performance on Saturday, the Tampa Bay Lightning defeated the Toronto Maple Leafs 5-2, snapping a four-game losing streak that had followed an impressive 20-1-1 run. Nikita Kucherov reco...

item.title: A mother seeks advice on her teen daughter’s anger toward an unfaithful father
item.description: A concerned mother wrote to Rappler’s advice column, seeking guidance because her 15-year-old daughter refuses to forgive her father for being unfaithful. The mother had confronted her husband about h...

item.title: The Misuse of ‘Liberation’ in Modern Conflicts
item.description: Muna Khan reflects on the harsh realities of war from her perspective in Islamabad while her friends in Beirut face imminent Israeli bombings. She recounts her previous experiences in Lebanon in 2009,...

item.title: Political Tensions Emerge Over Venue Change at International Santal Conclave
item.description: A political controversy has emerged over the recent International Santal Conclave in West Bengal, following a last-minute venue change by the state government. President Droupadi Murmu, who belongs to...

item.title: Siaya Police Deploy Security for Orengo's Staff Before Ruto's Visit
item.description: Siaya County police have clarified that Governor James Orengo's bodyguard and eight county staffers were deployed ahead of President William Ruto's visit to the county. This comes after rumours swirle...

item.title: Son of missing Norwich woman Kellie Pratt urges Steve Wright to confess amid speculation over unsolved disappearance
item.description: Kurtis Pratt, now in his late 20s or early 30s, was just four years old when his mother, Kellie Pratt, vanished in Norwich on 11 June 2000. Kellie, aged 28 and struggling with drug addiction, worked a...

item.title: Bible Society of Nigeria to host annual primary school Bible quiz in Lagos
item.description: The Bible Society of Nigeria (BSN) don announce say dem go hold the 15th edition of their annual Primary School Bible Competition on March 11, 2026. This competition na part of their effort to make ch...

item.title: Nigerian Police Force Removes Benjamin Hundeyin as Force PRO, Appoints Anthony Okon Placid as Replacement Amid Restructuring
item.description: The Nigerian Police Force don remove Assistant Commissioner of Police Benjamin Hundeyin from im position as Force Public Relations Officer (FPRO). Dem replace am with Deputy Commissioner of Police Ant...

item.title: Soham community reflects quietly on Ian Huntley's death
item.description: The town of Soham in Cambridgeshire remains marked by the tragic murders of Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman in 2002. The girls, both aged 10, vanished after attending a family barbecue, sparking an in...

item.title: Marcos Jr. and VP Duterte commit to advancing protection and welfare programs for Filipinas
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. and Vice President Sara Duterte have publicly pledged their commitment to supporting initiatives aimed at better protecting and empowering Filipinas across the nation. T...

item.title: UFC to Host Historic Fight Card at White House Featuring Topuria vs Gaethje
item.description: The UFC has officially announced a historic event at the White House on 14 June, coinciding with US President Donald Trump's 80th birthday and the country's 250th anniversary. The main event will see ...

item.title: Eskom initiates legal process against 14 municipalities over unpaid R110bn electricity debt
item.description: Eskom has taken formal steps against 14 municipalities owing over R110 billion in unpaid electricity fees. The utility announced on Thursday that it is invoking the Promotion of Administrative Justice...

item.title: Israel Conducts Strikes on Iranian Fuel Depots Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: The Israeli military launched strikes on several Iranian fuel storage facilities late Saturday, causing large explosions and fires in Tehran and nearby Karaj, according to reports. Iran’s Ministry of ...

item.title: Key Nigerian Headlines: Bwala Defends Tinubu Interview, Ministers Eye 2027 Guber Races, Peter Obi Joins ADC Fully, Petrol Queues Return Amid Price Hike
item.description: Good morning, my people. For today Sunday 8th March 2026, plenty big stories dey ground for Naija newspapers. First, Special Adviser to President Tinubu on Media, Daniel Bwala, talk say he sabi wetin ...

item.title: Legal Penalties in Gulf States for Sharing War Footage on Social Media
item.description: Authorities in several Gulf countries, including the UAE, Bahrain, Kuwait, and Qatar, have issued strict warnings regarding the sharing of digital content related to the ongoing conflict in the region...

item.title: Three Teens Arrested in Winnipeg After Armed Pizza Delivery Robbery
item.description: Winnipeg police have arrested three teenagers following an armed robbery targeting a pizza delivery worker on March 5. The incident occurred just before 7:30 p.m. at an apartment complex on Victor Str...

item.title: Pakistan Security Forces Conduct Successful Operations Against India-Sponsored Terrorists in KP
item.description: Pakistan’s security forces carried out multiple high-intensity, intelligence-based operations across Khyber Pakhtunkhwa on 6th and 7th March, successfully neutralising 13 terrorists reportedly backed ...

item.title: Understanding Bribery: What Constitutes Illegal Payments in the Philippines
item.description: Bribery, locally known as panunuhol, refers to offering, giving, receiving, or soliciting something of value with the intent of influencing the actions of an official or other person in a position of ...
